EPA141A

  • Schedule
  • Lectures
  • 🐍 Software Installation
    • Graphical Installation (Anaconda Navigator)
    • Command-Line Installation
  • 🔬 Labs
    • Lab 1 — Exploratory Modelling with the Lake Problem
    • Lab 2 — Global Sensitivity Analysis
    • Lab 3 — Scenario Discovery: PRIM and Dimensional Stacking
    • Lab 4 — MOEA Setup and Optimisation
    • Lab 5 — Pareto Analysis, Visualisation, and Convergence
    • Lab 6 — Multi-Objective Robust Decision Making (MORDM)
  • 📝 Assignments
    • Assignment 1 — Exploratory Modeling with JUSTICE
    • Assignment 2 — Sensitivity Analysis: Which Inputs Matter?
    • Assignment 3 — Scenario Discovery: When Do Policies Fail?
    • Assignment 4 — Problem Formulation
    • Assignment 5 — Many-Objective Optimisation (Local Run)
    • Assignment 6 — MOEA Convergence
    • Assignment 7 — Pareto Visualisation
    • Assignment 8 — Robustness Analysis

Actor Constellation

Contents

  • Full actor list

Actor Constellation#

There are 30 actor groups organised into six negotiating blocs.

Full actor list#

Each student group self-assigns one actor. The Group # column is filled in during the first lecture.

#

Actor

Bloc

Group #

1

AOSIS (Alliance of Small Island States)

1 — Existential Frontline

2

Pacific Island Forum

1 — Existential Frontline

3

CARICOM (Caribbean Community)

1 — Existential Frontline

4

Global Youth & Future Generations Coalition

1 — Existential Frontline

5

Indigenous Peoples & Local Communities (IPLC)

1 — Existential Frontline

6

African Group of Negotiators (AGN)

2 — African & LDC

7

LDC Group (Least Developed Countries)

2 — African & LDC

8

South Africa

2 — African & LDC

9

Like-Minded Developing Countries (LMDC)

2 — African & LDC

10

World Bank & International Climate Finance Coalition

2 — African & LDC

11

3 — BASIC & Major Emerging

India

3 — BASIC & Major Emerging

3 — BASIC & Major Emerging

ASEAN Bloc

3 — BASIC & Major Emerging

Mexico & Central America (AILAC)

3 — BASIC & Major Emerging

4 — High Ambition Coalition
